scripts.build: npm run clean && esbuild src/main.jsx --bundle --platform=browser --format=iife --outfile=dist/autoworkbench.js --loader:.css=css --jsx=automatic && node scripts/build-preview.mjs
scripts.test:panel-v2: vitest run tests-dom/panel-v2-smoke.test.jsx tests-dom/panel-v2-static-audit.test.jsx tests-dom/panel-v2-preview.test.jsx tests-dom/panel-v2-preview-route.test.jsx tests-dom/panel-v2-interactions.test.jsx
